source_pr.title: ddl: avoid assert in hook function.
source_pr.body: Hook function runs in another goroutine, assert failed will silently exit that goroutine.

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky around DDL/schema changes where schema propagation is asynchronous. This PR stabilizes it by: ddl: avoid assert in hook function.
fix_pattern: ddl: avoid assert in hook function.

evidence: files: ddl/bg_worker_test.go, ddl/column_change_test.go, ddl/column_test.go, ddl/ddl_test.go, ddl/ddl_worker_test.go, ddl/foreign_key_test.go, ddl/index_change_test.go, ddl/index_test.go, ddl/reorg_test.go, ddl/schema_test.go, ddl/stat_test.go, ddl/table_test.go
